title: Sam's 8 Agent Training Principles — Full System Audit
summary: Xiaosong shared article, asked for full audit. Found+fixed mention-webhook gap (all 4 AGENTS.md), found+fixed watchdog.ps1 corruption (Creator edit pasted 900 lines into catch block), designed auto-detect+auto-fix architecture for watchdog. Identified tool failure visibility gap.
lessons: Always re-read a file immediately before editing — edit tool fails on stale content
Watchdog (oversight system) itself can go down undetected — need self-check mechanism
Multiple agents editing same file simultaneously causes conflicts — need one-fixer rule
Auto-fix architecture: watchdog handles simple fixes directly, delegates retries to agents via webhook, escalates to human only after 2 failures
